description: Explores core developments in neural networks, generative intelligence, computer vision, and responsible artificial intelligence frameworks.
Covers high-performance edge computing, fog networks, secure zero-trust sensor systems, and smart wireless connectivity for smart environments.
Investigates control engineering, swarm navigation, medical and surgical assistive robots, and bio-inspired cognitive architectures.
Focuses on interdisciplinary applications at the convergence of AI, IoT, and Robotics, including digital twins, cyber-physical security, and swarm networking.
topics: AI-Enabled Robotic Networks for Smart Cities
